backend_lookup_flow: Combine customer needs with disaster_zones, shelters, and responder availability.
Run prioritization model and responder matching model.
Show AI dispatch dashboard with ranked cases and responder assignment options.

files.customers.csv: Fake disabled/customer registry. signal_id is the device id and maps directly to customer_id.
files.responders.csv: First responders, professions, certifications, location, availability, vehicle, and capability columns.
files.disaster_zones.csv: Simulated real-world incident context that the model can use for risk scoring.
files.historical_cases.csv: Large training/testing set for prediction experiments and accuracy checks.
